square.comment_1: 这款帐篷的防水性能怎么样？
square.feed_text_1: 这套露营装备简直太棒了！颜值极高，最重要的是 0Buck 100% 返现，强烈推荐！🏕️✨ 无论是在山间还是湖边，都能提供最舒适的体验。套装包含帐篷、睡袋、折叠椅和便携炉具，每一件都是经过严格筛选的，品质无忧。现在参与集采还有机会赢取额外积分哦！
square.feed_text_2: 终于收到了！实物比照片还要精致。正在考虑要不要再入一个新出的耳机拼单。🎧🔥 音质纯净，降噪效果超出预期，非常适合在办公室或地铁使用。如果你也在找一款高颜值的无线耳机，千万不要错过这款，我已经安利给好几个朋友了！
square.found_treasure: 这是我在 0Buck 发现的宝藏好物！
square.reply_1: 亲测防水效果极佳，上周末遇到了大雨，一点都没漏！
square.search_placeholder: 搜索官方活动、拼单、话题...

wishlistdetail.joining_the_wishlist_does: Joining the wishlist does not require immediate payment. You are expressing interest， not placing a binding order. We will not charge you until the official C2W phase starts.
wishlistdetail.this_concept_represents_t: This concept represents the next generation of modular workspace integration. We are investigating global manufacturing feasibility. By joining the wishlist， you help us negotiate with top-tier verified artisans to bring this to life at a fraction of retail cost.
wishlistdetail.we_are_currently_in_the_c: "We are currently in the community discovery phase to gauge real-world demand. Your ""wish"" helps us decide whether to move forward with mass production."
wishlistdetail.we_noticed_a_gap_in_the_m: """We noticed a gap in the market for high-quality， sustainable workspace tools. Most options are either too expensive or poorly made. This modular system aims to be the last desk organizer you'll ever need to buy."""
wishlistdetail.we_re_monitoring_communit: """We're monitoring community interest. Once we hit goal， we'll launch a collective pre-order with exclusive factory pricing."""
wishlistdetail.we_will_notify_you_immedi: We will notify you immediately via VCC message once the product reaches its goal or moves to the next phase.
wishlistdetail.wishlist_members_get_a_24: "Wishlist members get a 24-hour head start and an additional 10% ""Insight Discount"" when the pre-order goes live."
